title: OpenAI Proposes Giving 5% Stake to US Government
subtitle: Tech leaders explore new ways to share AI wealth and improve government relations

summary.en: OpenAI is currently in early discussions to offer a 5% ownership stake to the US government. CEO Sam Altman believes this move could help the public benefit from the rapid growth of artificial intelligence. The proposal aims to build better relationships with the Trump administration amid rising public concern about AI. While OpenAI is leading these talks, it remains unclear if other major tech companies will join the plan. Experts suggest that such a deal could help the industry gain political support and address national security worries.
summary.zh: OpenAI 目前正處於初步討論階段，計畫將 5% 的所有權轉讓給美國政府。執行長奧特曼認為，此舉有助於大眾從人工智慧的快速成長中獲益。在公眾對人工智慧日益擔憂的背景下，該提案旨在與川普政府建立更良好的關係。雖然 OpenAI 在這些談判中居於領先地位，但其他大型科技公司是否會加入該計畫尚不明朗。專家指出，此類協議可能有助於產業獲得政治支持並解決國家安全疑慮。

paragraphs.en: OpenAI, the company behind the popular ChatGPT, is currently in early discussions to give a 5% stake in its business to the US government. This move is part of a larger effort by artificial intelligence companies to improve their relationship with the administration of President Donald Trump. According to reports from the Financial Times, OpenAI’s chief executive, Sam Altman, believes that giving the American public a financial share in the company is the best way to distribute the economic benefits of AI technology.
paragraphs.zh: 開發熱門聊天機器人 ChatGPT 的 OpenAI 公司，目前正處於初步討論階段，計畫將公司 5% 的股權轉讓給美國政府。此舉是人工智慧企業為改善與川普（Donald Trump）政府關係所做的努力之一。根據《金融時報》（Financial Times）報導，OpenAI 執行長奧特曼（Sam Altman）認為，讓美國大眾持有公司股份，是分享人工智慧技術經濟紅利的最佳方式。

paragraphs.en: This proposal is still in the early, conceptual stages. If the plan goes forward, it would likely involve creating an investment vehicle similar to the Alaska Permanent Fund. This fund is a government-managed account that invests money from oil profits into stocks and pays dividends—regular payments of money—to state residents. By using a similar model, OpenAI hopes that every American citizen could eventually own a small part of the growth driven by AI, even if they do not personally invest in the stock market.
paragraphs.zh: 這項提案目前仍處於構想階段。若計畫付諸實行，可能會建立一個類似「阿拉斯加永久基金」（Alaska Permanent Fund）的投資工具。該基金是由政府管理的帳戶，將石油利潤投資於股票，並定期向州內居民發放股利。透過採用類似模式，OpenAI 希望每位美國公民最終都能擁有由人工智慧驅動的成長紅利，即便他們個人並未投資股市。

paragraphs.en: These discussions come at a time when major technology companies are facing significant pressure from Washington. As reported by The Guardian, the government has recently taken a more active role in overseeing AI development. For example, the company Anthropic was recently ordered to limit access to its newest model for foreign citizens due to national security concerns. While Anthropic has since resolved these issues, the incident highlights the growing tension between tech developers and federal officials.
paragraphs.zh: 這些討論正值大型科技公司面臨華府巨大壓力之際。據《衛報》（The Guardian）報導，政府近期在監管人工智慧發展方面採取了更積極的態度。例如，人工智慧公司 Anthropic 最近因國家安全考量，被要求限制外國公民使用其最新模型。儘管 Anthropic 後來已解決這些問題，但此事件凸顯了科技開發商與聯邦官員之間日益緊張的關係。

paragraphs.en: Beyond government pressure, AI companies are also dealing with what some have called an “AI hate wave.” According to Ars Technica, recent polls show that many Americans are worried about the rapid development of AI. About 70 percent of people do not want large AI data centers built in their local areas, and many citizens feel more concerned than excited about the technology. With elections approaching, both political parties are aware that voters want stricter rules for the industry. However, both the Trump administration and tech leaders have warned that too many regulations could cause the United States to fall behind China in the global AI race.
paragraphs.zh: 除了政府壓力外，人工智慧公司還面臨所謂的「反人工智慧浪潮」。根據《Ars Technica》報導，近期民調顯示許多美國人對人工智慧的快速發展感到擔憂。約 70% 的民眾不希望在當地興建大型人工智慧資料中心，許多公民對這項技術感到擔憂多過於興奮。隨著選舉臨近，兩大政黨都意識到選民希望對該產業實施更嚴格的規範。然而，川普政府與科技業領袖皆警告，過多的監管可能導致美國在全球人工智慧競賽中落後於中國。

paragraphs.en: While OpenAI is pushing for this 5% stake, it is not yet clear if other industry giants like Google and Meta will agree to the same plan. The Financial Times noted that while Altman has spoken with President Trump, commerce secretary Howard Lutnick, and treasury secretary Scott Bessent, other companies have not yet indicated they are willing to give up a portion of their ownership. Furthermore, any final agreement would likely require an act of Congress to become law.
paragraphs.zh: 雖然 OpenAI 極力推動這 5% 的股權轉讓，但目前尚不清楚 Google 與 Meta 等其他產業巨頭是否會同意採取相同計畫。《金融時報》指出，儘管奧特曼已與川普總統、商務部長盧特尼克（Howard Lutnick）及財政部長貝森特（Scott Bessent）進行溝通，但其他公司尚未表示願意釋出部分所有權。此外，任何最終協議若要成為法律，很可能需要國會通過法案。

paragraphs.en: There are also different ideas about how to handle AI wealth. Senator Bernie Sanders has been advocating for a different approach. He has suggested creating a government-run fund financed by a one-time 50% tax on the stock of the largest AI companies. This is a much more aggressive plan than the 5% stake proposed by OpenAI. The senator has been in talks with industry leaders, but it remains to be seen which path the government will choose.
paragraphs.zh: 對於如何處理人工智慧帶來的財富，各界也有不同看法。參議員桑德斯（Bernie Sanders）一直提倡採取不同途徑。他建議建立一個由政府運作的基金，資金來源是對大型人工智慧公司股票徵收一次性 50% 的稅款。這項計畫比 OpenAI 提議的 5% 股權更為激進。該位參議員已與產業領袖進行會談，但政府最終會選擇哪條路徑仍有待觀察。

paragraphs.en: As OpenAI and other firms prepare to list their shares on the stock market, some investors believe these companies could eventually be worth more than $1 trillion. This massive potential value is why the debate over public ownership is so important. By offering a small stake to the government, companies hope to show that they are willing to work with the public interest rather than just for their own profits.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著 OpenAI 與其他公司準備在股市上市，部分投資人認為這些公司的市值最終可能超過 1 兆美元。這龐大的潛在價值正是大眾所有權爭議如此重要的原因。透過提供政府一小部分股權，企業希望展現他們願意與公眾利益共榮，而不僅僅是為了自身獲利。

paragraphs.en: For now, the situation remains fluid. The discussions are private, and no official deal has been signed. Whether this 5% stake will be enough to change public opinion or satisfy government regulators is a question that will likely be answered in the coming months. As the AI industry continues to grow, the relationship between these powerful companies and the American government will continue to be a central issue in national politics.
paragraphs.zh: 目前情況仍充滿變數。相關討論皆屬私下進行，尚未簽署任何正式協議。這 5% 的股權是否足以改變公眾輿論或滿足政府監管機構，將在未來幾個月內揭曉。隨著人工智慧產業持續成長，這些強大的科技公司與美國政府之間的關係，將持續成為國家政治的核心議題。

keyTerms.definitionEn: A financial share or interest in a business.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（木樁），這裡指商業上的股份。文中：OpenAI, the company behind the popular ChatGPT, is currently in early discussions to give a 5% stake in its business to the US government.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A method or structure used to achieve a particular purpose, especially financial.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 工具、手段（用於達成特定目的，如投資）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（交通工具），這裡指金融投資工具。文中：If the plan goes forward, it would likely involve creating an investment vehicle similar to the Alaska Permanent Fund.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Subject to change; not fixed or settled.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作形容詞（液體的），這裡形容局勢尚未定案。文中：For now, the situation remains fluid.

sources.name: The Guardian Technology
sources.title: OpenAI ‘in early talks to give 5% stake to US government’

sources.name: Ars Technica
sources.title: Trump gets OpenAI to offer US 5% stake, far lower than Sanders’ target

previousArticles.title: OpenAI Proposes Giving 5% Stake to US Government
previousArticles.summaryEn: OpenAI is currently in early talks to give a 5% share of the company to the US government. CEO Sam Altman believes this move could help share the economic benefits of AI with the public. The proposal aims to improve the industry's relationship with the Trump administration amid rising pressure. Other major AI companies have been approached, though it remains unclear if they will join the plan. This strategy comes as many Americans express concerns about the rapid growth of artificial intelligence.

quiz.question: What is the primary motivation behind OpenAI’s proposal to give a 5% stake to the US government?

options.A: To comply with a new law requiring AI companies to share profits.
options.B: To improve relations with the Trump administration and distribute AI's economic benefits.
options.C: To prevent the government from imposing a 50% tax on their stock.
options.D: To match the policies already implemented by companies like Google and Meta.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第一段，OpenAI 提出此計畫是為了改善與川普政府的關係，並透過讓大眾持有股份來分享 AI 技術帶來的經濟利益。選項 A 錯誤，因為目前這僅是早期討論，並非法律強制要求。選項 C 錯誤，因為 50% 的稅收建議是由 Bernie Sanders 提出的，並非 OpenAI 的動機。選項 D 錯誤，因為文中提到其他科技巨頭尚未表示願意跟進。

quiz.question: Based on the text, why might the US government be hesitant to impose strict regulations on AI companies?

options.A: Because they believe AI companies are already doing enough to help the public.
options.B: Because they are worried about losing the global AI competition against China.
options.C: Because the government lacks the technical expertise to regulate such companies.
options.D: Because the public has expressed strong support for the current AI development path.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第四段，儘管大眾對 AI 有疑慮且政府希望加強監管，但川普政府與科技領袖都警告，過多的法規可能會導致美國在 AI 領域的全球競爭中落後於中國。選項 A 錯誤，文中並未提到政府認為企業已做得足夠。選項 C 雖為現實考量，但文中未提及。選項 D 與事實相反，文中明確提到民眾對 AI 感到擔憂。

quiz.question: In the final paragraph, what does the word 'fluid' mean in the context of the current situation?

options.A: Easily changed or not yet settled.
options.B: Moving quickly toward a specific goal.
options.C: Causing a lot of confusion among the public.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。在此語境中，「fluid」形容局勢尚不穩定、隨時可能變動，尚未達成最終協議。選項 B 錯誤，因為文中並未暗示進展快速。選項 C 雖提到討論是私下的，但 fluid 本身不代表混亂。選項 D 錯誤，因為文中提到存在許多爭議與不同意見，並非沒有障礙。

quiz.question: What is the central theme of this article?

options.A: A detailed analysis of how the Alaska Permanent Fund operates.
options.B: A comparison between Bernie Sanders' tax plan and OpenAI's proposals.
options.C: The growing tension between the US government and the public regarding AI.
options.D: The complex relationship between AI companies and the government as they navigate regulation and public perception.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。文章全面探討了 OpenAI 的股份提案、政府監管壓力、公眾對 AI 的反感以及如何在經濟利益與法規之間取得平衡，涵蓋了科技業與政府間的多層次互動。選項 A 只是文中用來解釋模型的例子，非主旨。選項 B 僅是文章的一部分。選項 C 忽略了科技公司在其中的主動角色，因此 D 是最完整且精確的總結。
